Classes & Events

Learn to feel
your own energy.

Small, experiential classes designed for beginners and the curious. No experience needed — just an open mind.

Signature Class

Awakening Your
Healing Touch

This welcoming, intuitive class is designed for anyone curious about energy healing — no prior experience required. Amy guides you through the fundamentals of feeling and working with your own energy in a small, personal group setting.

You'll leave with a deeper connection to yourself, practical tools you can use at home, and a sense of calm and clarity that stays with you long after the class ends.

Audience
Beginners & the curious
Group Size
Limited enrollment
Location
Easton, MD · Sarasota, FL
Next Class
Coming soon — join waitlist
Join the Waitlist Call Amy
Included

Crystal pendulum
to take home

What You'll Learn

Class curriculum

Every class is experiential — you'll feel this work, not just hear about it.

01

Grounding & Hand Activation

Begin with a guided grounding meditation that settles your energy and activates sensitivity in your hands — the foundation of all energy work.

02

The Chakra System

An introduction to the body's seven major energy centers: where they are, what they govern, and how to sense when one is out of balance.

03

Pendulum Training

Learn to use and program a crystal pendulum as a practical tool for assessing your own energy and receiving intuitive guidance at home.

04

Personal Energy Assessment

Practice scanning and reading your own energetic field. Identify areas of tension, blockage, or depletion with guided support from Amy.

05

Partner Practice

Optional partner exercises where you practice sensing another person's energy — a profound experience that builds trust in your own intuition.

06

Guided Chakra Meditation

A closing meditation that moves through each chakra, leaving you in a state of deep balance and integration before you leave.

After the Class

What you leave with

  • ✦ A deeper, felt connection to your own energy
  • ✦ A crystal pendulum programmed for your personal use
  • ✦ Practical grounding and balancing techniques for daily life
  • ✦ An understanding of the chakra system you can apply on your own
  • ✦ Take-home resources to continue your practice
  • ✦ A sense of calm, clarity, and renewed connection to yourself
Is This for You?

This class is perfect if you…

✦

Are new to energy healing and don't know where to start

✦

Feel overwhelmed, disconnected, or stuck and want relief

✦

Are curious about intuition and want to develop your own

✦

Want practical tools to support your wellbeing at home

✦

Prefer learning in a small, supportive group environment

✦

Are ready to experience energy — not just read about it
